cards.front: What is the primary purpose of exploratory data analysis (EDA) in data visualization?
cards.back: To identify patterns, correlations, and outliers in a dataset, which can inform further data analysis and visualization.

cards.front: Which R graphical package is used for creating a circular representation of proportional data?
What type of plot is used to visualize the relationship between two continuous variables?
Which type of plot is used to display the distribution of continuous data?
What is the primary difference between a box plot and a histogram?
cards.back: A box plot shows the distribution of a dataset, while a histogram displays the distribution of a continuous variable, often using bars to represent data density.
